prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 6.6L inline-6 (engine code: HS6C) with a fully built, dry-sumped version featuring a billet crankshaft from Bryant Racing, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by Schrick (280° duration, 12mm lift) for high-RPM stability (redline at 6,200 RPM).

Forced Induction: Install a bespoke twin-screw supercharger system by Sprintex (model: S5-2150) with a custom intercooler setup (PWR Australia) and a Tial 44mm wastegate to manage boost at 12 psi. Use a custom intake manifold by Kinsler Fuel Injection with dual 1,000cc Bosch Motorsport injectors and an AEM 400X EMS for fuel and ignition mapping.

Suspension & Chassis: Replace the original Dubonnet independent front suspension with a custom coilover setup by Öhlins (TTX40 series) paired with adjustable spherical bearings from Aurora Bearing. Reinforce the chassis with a custom subframe by Heidts Hot Rod & Muscle Car Parts, integrating a 4-point roll cage by Custom Cages UK for rigidity. Use AP Racing 6-piston calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS3000 pads for braking.
estetica: Bodywork: Restore the original aluminum body panels with hand-beaten replacements by The Metal Surgeon (UK), then apply a custom widebody kit by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) adapted specifically for the H6C’s proportions, featuring riveted fender flares and a custom rear diffuser by Liberty Walk (modified for the H6C’s chassis).

Aerodynamics: Install a custom front splitter by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) with integrated canards by 9 Lives Racing. Add a functional rear wing by Voltex (Type 3, 1,800mm width) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals by Aerosport Modelling. Use a custom radiator ducting system by VRS Performance to optimize airflow.

Interior & Details: Replace the original interior with a full Alcantara retrim by Katzkin, featuring custom embroidery of the Hispano-Suiza logo on the headrests. Install a custom dashboard by Classic Instruments with a digital speedometer (0-200 mph) and a MoTeC C127 data logger. Use a custom steering wheel by Nardi (380mm, suede) with a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations. Add a custom billet aluminum shifter by B&M (short throw) and a hand-stitched leather shift boot by Red Line Goods.
